title: hepetis camptocalyx var. lutea
intro: Hepetis camptocalyx var. lutea, also known as Lutea Sage, is a variant of the Sage plant species, known for its yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, allowing it to be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lutea Sage include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant. Lutea Sage can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
